subject: physics
title: 22M.1.SL.TZ1.3
question_html:
A student measures the time for 20 oscillations of a pendulum. The experiment is repeated four times. The measurements are:

10.45 s

10.30 s

10.70 s

10.55 s

What is the best estimate of the uncertainty in the average time for 20 oscillations?

A.  0.01 s

B.  0.05 s

C.  0.2 s

D.  0.5 s
examiners_html: This question was well answered, although option B was a significant distractor for candidates focusing on the last significant digit.
